'''Calder Brya''' was a [[Gender/Legends|male]] [[Human/Legends|Human]] who lived on the [[Planet/Legends|planet]] [[Coruscant/Legends|Coruscant]]. His disarming, self-deprecating sense of humor made it easy for him to connect with people, even those who might otherwise dismiss him based on his upper-crust status.<ref name="Coruscant and the Core Worlds" />

Aside from being a rich socialite with a million [[Galactic Credit Standard/Legends|credits]] in his account, Brya was also a fit and skilled [[Shockball/Legends|shockball]] player, if not much of a fighter. He was also very well-connected with the highest levels of Coruscant society.<ref name="Coruscant and the Core Worlds" />
